## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is it needed?

## Impacted Specs

- [ ] `api/openapi/v1.yaml`
- [ ] `api/API-CONTRACTS.md`
- [ ] `tests/TEST-PLAN.md`
- [ ] policies/workflows/definitions docs

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secret, token or credential is introduced in committed files
- [ ] Authn/authz impact reviewed
- [ ] Error model impact reviewed
- [ ] Sensitive data handling reviewed
- [ ] Tests and evidence updated for security-sensitive changes

## Validation

- [ ] `bash scripts/check-contract-drift.sh`
- [ ] OpenAPI validation
- [ ] Relevant manual/doc review completed
